headline: Top Models & Releases stories this week

stories.title: Luma AI's new Uni-1 image model tops Nano Banana 2 and GPT Image 1.5 on logic-based benchmarks
stories.summary: Luma AI takes on OpenAI and Google with Uni-1, a model that combines image understanding and generation in a single architecture and reasons through prompts as it creates. The article Luma AI's new Uni-1 image model tops Nano Banana 2 and GPT Image 1.5 on logic-based benchmarks appeared first on The

stories.title: LLM text data is drying up, but Meta points to unlabeled video as the next massive training frontier
stories.summary: A research team from Meta FAIR and New York University trained a multimodal AI model from scratch and found that several common assumptions about how these models should be built don't hold up. The article LLM text data is drying up, but Meta points to unlabeled video as the next massive training fr

stories.title: Hallucinated references are passing peer review at top AI conferences and a new open tool wants to fix that
stories.summary: Fake citations are slipping past peer review at top AI conferences, and commercial LLMs can't spot the fakes they generate. A new open-source tool called CiteAudit allegedly catches what GPT, Gemini, and Claude miss. The article Hallucinated references are passing peer review at top AI conferences a

stories.title: OpenAI's hardware and robotics chief quits over military deal she says lacked enough deliberation
stories.summary: OpenAI's head of robotics, Caitlin Kalinowski, is leaving the company over its Pentagon deal, citing concerns about mass surveillance and lethal autonomy. The article OpenAI's hardware and robotics chief quits over military deal she says lacked enough deliberation appeared first on The Decoder.
